title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech examines whether Google engineers adopt "vibe coding" practices and compares code generation vibes across OpenAI Codex and Claude. The video explores code generation adoption at Google across 2024, 2025, and 2026 timelines.
